title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at IIT Bombay - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at IIT Bombay - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
IIT Bombay, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Curriculum Developer for our Nashik operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIT Bombay:
IIT Bombay is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIT Bombay!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
